arts.ttl: Confirmed: Barcelona star included in matchday squad for first time this season
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Wednesday evening announced some altogether positive news on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that Ronald Araújo has been included in the club’s…

arts.ttl: Who is François Letexier, the referee for Borussia Dortmund vs Barcelona in the UCL today?
arts.sum: Referee François Letexier will take charge of today’s Champions League clash between Borussia Dortmund and Barcelona, as both teams bid to move a step closer to last-16 qualification . Letexier has never previously crossed paths with Barça, but has overseen two Dortmund games in the Champions League - both resounding group-stage wins for the Germans.

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona name XI for Borussia Dortmund clash
arts.sum: The XI of players set to be depended upon by La Liga giants Barcelona for the club’s upcoming meeting with Borussia Dortmund has been unveiled online. Barcelona are of course…

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Borussia Dortmund vs. Barcelona
arts.sum: Official team news has just been released for Die Schwarzgelben who play host to a high flying Barcelona for Matchday 6 of the UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: ‘The beast is back’ – Lamine Yamal responds to Barcelona teammate’s return to fitness
arts.sum: Barcelona youngster Lamine Yamal has taken to social media, to reveal his excitement at the impending return of teammate Ronald Araújo to the pitch. Defender Araújo is for his part…

arts.ttl: WATCH: Barca teen scores outrageous goal against Dortmund in UEFA Youth League
arts.sum: Barcelona winger Jan Virgili caught the eye on Wednesday with a frankly ridiculous goal for the team in the UEFA Youth League against Borussia Dortmund. ⚽️ Ousmane Diallo (39’) i Kaba (58’) / Jan Virgili (49’), Landry (65’) i Leo Saca (82’)

arts.ttl: Match Thread: Borussia Dortmund Face Robert Lewandowski and FC Barcelona
arts.sum: Use those and don’t share any illegal streams in the comments. Streaming: Paramount+ (USA), discovery+ (UK)

arts.ttl: Barcelona tell €60m star that he has no future at the club
arts.sum: Vitor Roque will not return to Barcelona after his loan at Real Betis, according to Spanish media. With Barcelona in desperate need to offload players to comply with LaLiga's financial regulations, they agreed to send Roque on loan to Real Betis.

arts.ttl: Report: Barcelona compile shortlists to address problem positions
arts.sum: Barcelona are reported to have compiled a list of three potential targets to address a shortage at right-back this season, as well as monitoring options on the left.

arts.ttl: Tebas gives his verdict on Barca’s hopes of registering Olmo
arts.sum: La Liga president Javier Tebas has been asked about Barcelona’s hopes of re-registering Dani Olmo and is hopeful the Catalans will be able to make their finances work. Tebas has been asked about the situation and thinks it will be done.
